tools.name: urlNotifications.indexingUrlNotificationsGetMetadata
tools.description: Gets metadata about a Web Document. This method can _only_ be used to query URLs that were previously seen in successful Indexing API notifications. Includes the latest `UrlNotification` received via this API.

tools.name: urlNotifications.indexingUrlNotificationsPublish
tools.description: Notifies that a URL has been updated or deleted.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
